abilities.name: Freikorps Suit
abilities.description: Ignores all damage from pulse and blast effects.

abilities.name: Litany of Healing
abilities.description: Friendly characters within a6 gain Regeneration +1. Freikorps characters gain Regeneration +2.

abilities.name: Nether Fluctuations
abilities.description: Enemy characters within a6 ignore suit associations from their Skills.

actions: (1) Hunting Knife (Labor) | AV: 4 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.

(1) Ancient Words (Sorcery) | AV: 6T (13T) | TN: 13T | Rg: 10 | Resist: Wp | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage, ignoring Armor and Hard to Wound. Mask Words of Binding: Target becomes Slow. Tome Resonance: +B to Moderate and Severe damage.
(2) Furious Casting | Discard Twist to take three (1) AP attack actions with Spell vs single target.
system.notes: Magical support specialists. Intelligence analysts and chant ancient words from recovered Grimoires. Knowledge is the warriors sharpest weapon.
